rules: Every image/audio asset needs source, author, license, and commercial-use status before release.
Unknown or placeholder assets must be replaced or formally approved.
Every gameplay animation cycle must have a generated contact sheet before it is approved.

stage-01-bg.author: unknown
stage-01-bg.notes: Active Stage 1 scene plate because it meets the current visual quality target better than prototype tiles. Gameplay still comes from Tiled-style object layers. Source/license must be documented or replaced before release.

metro-tiles.author: project prototype
metro-tiles.notes: Prototype/editor helper tileset only. It must not be used as the primary visible stage art until replaced with production-quality tiles/prefabs.

player-sheet.source: Deterministic final character sheet generated by tools/generate-final-character-sheets.py from project-provided Neon Gauntlet sprite sources and pixel weapon/silhouette overlays
player-sheet.author: AlgeriaTechGen / Neon Gauntlet project
player-sheet.commercialUse: approved for Neon Gauntlet commercial use
player-sheet.notes: Normalized through the final character sheet pipeline; animation metadata and contact sheets remain authoritative for runtime frames.

enemy-sheet.source: Deterministic final character sheet generated by tools/generate-final-character-sheets.py from project-provided Neon Gauntlet sprite sources and pixel weapon/silhouette overlays
enemy-sheet.author: AlgeriaTechGen / Neon Gauntlet project
enemy-sheet.commercialUse: approved for Neon Gauntlet commercial use
enemy-sheet.notes: Base approved runtime animation contract sheet used for frame registration and deterministic final role-sheet generation.

striker-sheet.commercialUse: approved for Neon Gauntlet commercial use
striker-sheet.notes: Final six-archetype enemy sheet: empty-hand balanced fighter. Generated with role palette and readable weapon overlays.
